top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal, the world's first trillionaire, JetBlue's Florida plans and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Spot Petrochemical Prices Retreat as Iran Premium Unwinds
top_signals.summary: US spot petrochemical prices continued to soften last week as easing tensions between the US and Iran weighed on export demand, though a series of operational issues along the Gulf Coast helped limit steeper declines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Maine closes data breach portal to the public after fake reports
top_signals.summary: Maine is still allowing companies to report breaches, but won’t make the portal easily available to the public until after it completes an audit of its procedures to stop such incidents, according to a press release from the Maine attorney general’s office.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
